items.title: Investment Banking & Brokerage Global Industry Report 2025: Debt & Equity Underwriting Drive Investment Banking Revenues Amid Market Volatility
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The investment banking and brokerage industry has seen growth in recent years, driven by increased demand for debt and equity underwriting as companies and governments sought to raise cash quickly. Market volatility also led to increased trading activity, benefiting the industry. However, profit margins have declined.
